title: FabricSimpleAFK
description: A simple fabric mod that lets you indicate you're AFK
body:
![Username of AFK player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/096d992bbfd17837c40f652879126f7f5ce51e39.png)

Installing this mod makes it easy to display your AFK status on your username.

The following commands are added:
- `/afk`
  Toggles AFK status
- `/afk lock`
  Locks AFK status (moving will not unlock it)
- `/afk unlock`
  Unlocks and exits AFK status
- `/afk gettimeout`
  Displays the number of minutes before a player is automatically considered AFK
- `/afk settimeout <minutes>`
  Changes the number of minutes before a player is automatically considered AFK (OP only)
